title: Quarterly bus fares statistics: July to September 2025
body: "The local bus fares index increased by 15.2% in England outside London between September 2024 and September 2025. This period covers the introduction of the £3 fare cap in England from 1 January 2025, which has led to a larger change than previous quarters.  For other areas, the local bus fares index change between September 2024 and September 2025 was:   0.0% increase in London 12.4% increase in metropolitan areas 16.9% increase in non-metropolitan areas 8.3% increase in Scotland 10.4% increase in Wales   The Consumer Price Index (CPI) increased by 3.8% over the same 12-month period.  Contact us  Bus statistics     Email bus.statistics@dft.gov.uk     Media enquiries 0300 7777 878       To hear more about DfT statistical publications as they are released, follow us on X at DfTStats. "
